writers.lyricist: Andy Hurley/Pete Wentz/Waqaas Hashmi/Jarrel Young/Liam O'Donnell/Jake Sinclair/Bob Mosher/Patrick Stump/Joe Trohman/Jack Marshall
writers.composer: Andy Hurley/Pete Wentz/Waqaas Hashmi/Jarrel Young/Liam O'Donnell/Jake Sinclair/Bob Mosher/Patrick Stump/Joe Trohman/Jack Marshall

lyrics.text: I can move mountains
lyrics.translation: 我能移山倒海

lyrics.text: I can work a miracle, work a miracle
lyrics.translation: 我能创造奇迹 创造奇迹

lyrics.text: Oh, oh, keep you like an oath
lyrics.translation: 哦 我能给你一个誓言

lyrics.text: May nothing but death do us part
lyrics.translation: 唯有死亡才能将你我分开

lyrics.text: She wants to dance like Uma Thurman
lyrics.translation: 她想如乌玛瑟曼那样舞蹈

lyrics.text: Bury me till I confess
lyrics.translation: 埋葬我直到我深刻忏悔

lyrics.text: She wants to dance like Uma Thurman
lyrics.translation: 她想如乌玛瑟曼那样舞蹈

lyrics.text: And I can’t get you out of my head
lyrics.translation: 我无法将你驱出脑海

lyrics.text: The stench, the stench, of summer sex
lyrics.translation: 性感夏季的恶臭污秽

lyrics.text: And CK eternity, oh hell yes
lyrics.translation: 和那永恒的CK 哦是这样

lyrics.text: Divide me down to the smallest I can be
lyrics.translation: 将我分割到支离破碎

lyrics.text: Put your, put you v-v-v-venom in me
lyrics.translation: 把你的毒液浸入我的身体

lyrics.text: I can move mountains
lyrics.translation: 我能移山倒海

lyrics.text: I can work a miracle, work a miracle
lyrics.translation: 我能创造奇迹 创造奇迹

lyrics.text: Oh, oh, keep you like an oath
lyrics.translation: 哦 我能给你一个誓言

lyrics.text: May nothing but death do us part
lyrics.translation: 唯有死亡才能将你我分开

lyrics.text: She wants to dance like Uma Thurman
lyrics.translation: 她想如乌玛瑟曼那样舞蹈

lyrics.text: Bury me till I confess
lyrics.translation: 埋葬我直到我深刻忏悔

lyrics.text: She wants to dance like Uma Thurman
lyrics.translation: 她想如乌玛瑟曼那样舞蹈

lyrics.text: And I can’t get you out of my head
lyrics.translation: 我无法将你驱出脑海

lyrics.text: The blood, the blood, the blood of the lamb
lyrics.translation: 如同待宰羔羊的血液

lyrics.text: It’s worth two lions, but here I am
lyrics.translation: 值够两头雄狮 但我在这里

lyrics.text: And I slept in last night’s clothes and tomorrow’s dreams
lyrics.translation: 昨夜我和衣沉睡在明日的梦乡

lyrics.text: But they’re not quite what they seem
lyrics.translation: 但它们不会只有表象

lyrics.text: I can move mountains
lyrics.translation: 我能移山倒海

lyrics.text: I can work a miracle, work a miracle
lyrics.translation: 我能创造奇迹 创造奇迹

lyrics.text: Oh, oh, keep you like an oath
lyrics.translation: 哦 我能给你一个誓言

lyrics.text: May nothing but death do us part
lyrics.translation: 唯有死亡才能将你我分开

lyrics.text: You’ll find your way
lyrics.translation: 你会找到你的方向

lyrics.text: And may death find you alive
lyrics.translation: 也许濒临绝境会让你感到重生

lyrics.text: Take me down the line
lyrics.translation: 带我沉入深渊

lyrics.text: In Gem City we claim the tide
lyrics.translation: 在宝石城我们追赶潮汐
